bodyHtml:
Recent operator-action digest

Window: last 5 day(s) · scope=sentiment-analyst Items: 2 · Forecasts emitted: 8 · Positions opened: 0

Each item below was extracted by the operator from a recent editor / QA / quality review, routed to an analyst, and either completed or is mid-flight. Use this to - avoid re-asking questions another analyst already investigated - pick up contradictions noted by the editor and resolved by a peer - weight your own conclusions against fresh forecast evidence

2026-07-16 · [research_task] 跟踪机器人、液冷、ST 新规首日交易信息

DONE · owner=sentiment-analyst · research discussion=跟踪机器人、液冷、ST 新规首日交易信息 (led by sentiment-analyst)

仅在出现订单、公告、融资异常或供货链证据时新开 research discussion。参考“今日收盘后”部分。

  • Outcome: research discussion "跟踪机器人、液冷、ST 新规首日交易信息" → completed | cards=10 | last-card: 压力测试结论（部分支持、实质修正 th_T01）：电力设备产能只能缓解设备子约束，无法压缩 4-7 年并网/核准/走廊排队——变压器满产（美 LPT 128-144 周、GOES 自 2020 翻倍；中国占全球产能约 60%、2025 出口 646 亿元 +36%、特变在手订单超 800 亿排产至 2027）只缩短设备等待，对排队约 0 提速[自测算]。故设备重估靠真实 3-5 年订单成立，但'电网 2027 解决 AI 电力'过于乐观，且中国西电年内 +75% 已在定价。自备电厂套利真实但正被监管抹平：美国 FERC 否决 Talen/Amazon 同… | → 8 fo…

  • Forecasts: 8 (0 positions); tickers: FERC, GW, ST, SEMI, WSTS, ALL

2026-07-13 · [research_task] 复核情绪报告海外叙事来源

DONE · owner=sentiment-analyst

sentiment-analyst 应复核早盘期权 PCR 升至 1.24、IV 跳升、以及 SK Hynix/Hologram 叙事的来源，区分硬数据与未核验部分。[S7]

  • Outcome: Covered in 海外叙事与未核验信号 / Overseas Narratives and Unverified Signals: PCR 1.24 and IV marked source-unknown, SK Hynix sourced, Hologram excluded.
